title: CLI self-timing: every bee.mjs run logs its wall time and prints one stderr summary line
action: Per work-visibility D3 (decision 4439bd7e). ALL edits land in BOTH twins byte-identically (templates/bee.mjs + .bee/bin/bee.mjs). In the direct-run guard region (templates/bee.mjs:5651-5659), wrap the main(argv) call with wall-time measurement: t0 before, on settle compute ms. After the command settles: (1) fail-open append one JSON line {ts: ISO, cmd: '<group> <verb>' (the resolved command name; 'unknown' when resolution failed), ms, ok: exitCode falsy} to .bee/logs/timings.jsonl - mkdirSync recursive + appendFileSync inside try/catch that swallows everything, mirroring hooks/adapter.mjs appendHookLog: a log failure never changes the command outcome or output; (2) print exactly one stderr line '[bee] <cmd> <ms>ms' - NEVER stdout: stdout must stay byte-identical for every verb (--json consumers and tests). --help short-circuit included (uniform). Timing applies only on direct run (isDirectRun), never when main is imported by tests. Tests in test_bee_cli.mjs (red-first evidence for each): (a) spawn a --json verb - stdout parses as JSON and contains no '[bee]' text, stderr matches /\[bee\] \S+ \d+ms/; (b) unknown command - timings.jsonl line has ok:false; (c) timings.jsonl line JSON-parses with ts/cmd/ms/ok; (d) logs dir unwritable - command still succeeds with normal stdout. Then regen INSIDE this cell: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply, render_plugin, release_manifest --write, impact_registry --write.

truths: stdout byte-identical for every verb - timing goes to stderr only
exactly one timing line per invocation
log append is fail-open: unwritable logs dir never breaks a command
regen complete: ledger parity, release_manifest --check and impact registry green

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check

trace.outcome: bee.mjs wall-times every direct run: fail-open .bee/logs/timings.jsonl line + one stderr summary line, stdout untouched
